name: Prize Coffee Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together 3/4 cup sugar and 1/4 cup softened margarine until well combined.
3. Add the egg to the mixture and beat until incorporated.
4. Stir in 1/2 cup skim milk until smooth.
5. Gradually add the flour, baking powder, and salt, stirring until a dough forms.
6. Mix in the brown sugar and cinnamon for the topping.
7. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch square pan.
8. Sprinkle the topping mixture evenly over the cake batter.
9. Bake for 25-35 minutes or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Turn off the oven and let the cake cool in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it to a wire rack to cool completely.
